summary: Execute a structured financial analysis process including statement review, ratio analysis, trend identification, and findings documentation.

inputs.name: financial_statements
inputs.description: Income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow statement for analysis period.

inputs.name: analysis_scope
inputs.description: Scope definition including period, comparison base, and focus areas.

inputs.name: benchmark_data
inputs.description: Industry benchmarks or prior period data for comparison.

outputs.name: analysis_report
outputs.description: Comprehensive analysis with findings, ratios, and trends.

outputs.name: findings_and_recommendations
outputs.description: Material findings and decision support recommendations.

budget.notes: High-stakes workflow. Preserve source labeling and reviewer handoff.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is financial analysis and not tax, investment, or legal advice.
Require financial statements and scope before any analysis narrative is generated.
Mark all findings as decision support and attach a finance-review disclaimer before external sharing.
End with a named human finance owner or reviewer handoff; do not claim approval.

steps.action: Review all three financial statements, identify material changes, and perform horizontal and vertical analysis.
Calculate key ratios across liquidity, profitability, efficiency, and leverage categories.
Identify financial risks surfaced from the analysis and assess likelihood and impact.
Compile findings, ratios, trends, and risk notes into a reviewer-ready analysis package.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read financial statements and benchmark data.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Write the analysis report when requested.

verification.method: Check all available statements were analyzed with period comparisons.
Check key ratios are calculated with interpretation.
Check the output includes disclaimer language and named reviewer handoff.

success_criteria: The report covers all available financial statements with material findings.
Key ratios are calculated, interpreted, and benchmarked where data is available.
The final output explicitly states it is not financial advice and requires human finance review before operational use.

rollback.when: If findings are unsupported or data is mislabeled, revert to the statement review step and regenerate.
